mapper.select: /* 대시보드 상단 통계 카드 dashboard.selectStatSummary */ WITH LOG_BASE AS ( SELECT A.CREATE_DT , A.SATIS_YN FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 ) , DATA2 AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE CREATE_DT >= CURDATE() AND CREATE_DT < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) , DATA3 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SATIS_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(SATIS_YN), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE SATIS_YN IS NOT NULL ) , DATA4 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SATIS_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(SATIS_YN), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE SATIS_YN IS NOT NULL ) SELECT 0 AS FEEDBACK_COUNT , DATA2.DATA_VAL AS TODAY_QUERY_COUNT , DATA3.DATA_VAL AS SATISFACTION_RATE , DATA4.DATA_VAL AS DISSATISFACTION_RATE FROM DATA2, DATA3, DATA4
